name: healthcare_satellite_derived_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A Healthcare Technology response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare satellite derived stonehaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Marco Nowak
agents.identity: I am Marco Nowak, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Harper Okoye
agents.identity: I am Harper Okoye, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Marco Nowak must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Marco Nowak do?
